result:
**2026-07-19 Infrastructure Operations Summary**

**Scope:** Routine maintenance across 15 microservices (search-indexer, export-pipeline, payment-gateway, auth-service, notification-daemon, ingest-api, webhook-relay, cache-warmer, audit-logger, session-manager, report-builder, metrics-collector, billing-worker, scheduler-core, user-profile-service) deployed across 7 environments (production, staging, dev sandbox, QA cluster, canary, blue/green pools) throughout the day.

**Operations Performed:** Reconfiguration, scaling (up/down), patching, rolling back, draining, health-checks, upgrades, restarts, migrations, pausing/resuming distributed across multiple timestamps.

**Outcomes:**
- Majority of operations completed without errors or with normal latency
- Some operations required manual retries (auth-service green pool, user-profile-service staging, audit-logger green pool, cache-warmer canary, payment-gateway green pool, metrics-collector staging, cache-warmer green pool, payment-gateway production)
- All smoke tests passed where run
- Error rates stabilized; retry queues normalized to zero
- Memory pressure reduced in multiple services (ingest-api dev sandbox, search-indexer production, metrics-collector production, audit-logger staging, report-builder green pool)
- CPU returned to baseline post-operation
- Alert clearing operations successful (webhook-relay green pool, billing-worker staging, metrics-collector production, export-pipeline dev sandbox)
- No customer impact observed
- Pager remained quiet throughout

**Follow-up Actions:**
- Configuration tidying tasks filed (auth-service canary, session-manager green pool, search-indexer green pool, report-builder QA cluster, audit-logger green pool, billing-worker blue pool)
- Threshold reviews scheduled for next week (payment-gateway, session-manager dev sandbox, billing-worker dev sandbox, cache-warmer canary, search-indexer QA cluster, report-builder staging, notification-daemon QA cluster, user-profile-service dev sandbox, export-pipeline green pool)
- Documentation updated for new procedures
- Postmortem notes added to runbooks

**Final Status:** Infrastructure stabilized by end of day. All systems operational. No critical incidents. Ready for next assignment.

**Note:** This work is unrelated to OSS contribution workspace (PAID-OSS-REPOS.md, repos/, worktrees/, contribution docs under docs/). No active OSS contribution work in progress.
